title: The College Years
description: Module 1 — Self and school: reviewing the simple present and adverbs of frequency, then mastering the simple past of regular and irregular verbs (affirmative, negative and questions) and asking for information with WH-questions
sources: Let's Discover More English — 8th Year Basic Education, Teacher's Book (CNP 541805) — Module 1
